title: cacalia tristis
intro: Cacalia tristis, also known as the melancholy thistle or bitter fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. Consuming Cacalia tristis is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and even showing potential in cancer prevention. Cacalia tristis is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in various herbal remedies and supplements, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions.
